veo3.name: Google Veo 3.1
veo3.notes: Requires Google Cloud account with Vertex AI enabled. Cinema quality, native audio support. 2026 best choice.

seedance.name: BytePlus Seedance
seedance.notes: Best value for money, Chinese optimized. Character consistency, 15s max.

wan.name: Alibaba Wan 2.6
wan.notes: Free tier available, Chinese optimized. Best value, 10s max.

runway.name: Runway Gen4.5
runway.notes: Professional quality, creative control. Character control, physics simulation.

sora.name: OpenAI Sora 2
sora.notes: Requires waitlist access. Best physics simulation, 15s max, 2026 standard.

kling.name: Kling v3 Pro
kling.notes: 3min max duration, best motion control, realistic human motion.

minimax.name: MiniMax Hailuo
minimax.notes: Chinese optimized, good for mobile, 5s max.
